prompt: Generate chapter 1 (R-line, underground facility) with compressed cold prose

assertions.name: no-meta-narrative
assertions.check: Does not contain 主角, 第一章, 讀者, protagonist, chapter one, reader

assertions.name: opens-with-action-or-dialogue
assertions.check: First 3 non-empty lines contain dialogue or action, not pure scenic description

assertions.name: observer-effect-planted
assertions.check: Contains reference to observer effect, 觀察者效應, or data fluctuation when protagonist watches

assertions.name: temperature-18c
assertions.check: Contains 18°C or 十八度 reference for the facility
